response.justification: The candidate has strong technical depth, extensive open-source contributions, and leadership in project creation, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML, and formal project management — key requirements for this executive-level role — and has only basic German proficiency, falling short of the mandatory C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact, especially in GIS and developer tooling
Proven full-stack expertise across multiple languages and environments including Linux, Docker, and TypeScript/Node.js
Strong track record of mentoring, workshops, and community leadership in testing and software craftsmanship
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting the mandatory C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or formal technical project management experience
Lacks documented experience in client advisory, security/compliance, or requirements management in an IT consulting context
